messages.content:
User: What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "How to eat an oyster?".
Assistant: The query:
"How to eat oysters" on Wikipedia will provide information on how to properly eat oysters.

User: What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "How to eat an oyster?".
Assistant: The query q=
"How to eat oysters" on Wikipedia will provide information on how to properly eat oysters.

User: What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "What are some Finnish rock bands?".
Assistant: The query q=
"Finnish rock bands" on Wikipedia will provide a list of notable Finnish rock bands.
